name: Special Orders - Process a Purchase Order
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Special Order feature is an efficient process for selling products sourced directly from the supplier (instead of inventory held at your Store or Warehouse)."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "You can even use the feature to simultaneously sell and order products low in stock (or out of stock altogether) as a way of short cutting the process to create a Purchase Order."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The Purchase Order is created when a sale containing one or more items marked as Special Order items is finalised in POS"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Purchase Orders are created as "}, {"text": "Incomplete", "bold": true}, {"text": " (so they can be reviewed prior to placing On-Order) and linked to the Customer Order"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If you add multiple Special Order items on a sale, one PO will be created for each unique combination of Source Outlet and Supplier e.g. two Special Order items available from two different suppliers will result in two POs"}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If the Order quantity on the Customer Order is increased or new products are added after the order has been finalised, a separate Purchase Order will be created for the additional quantity. These can be combined into a single Purchase Order before being sent to the Supplier by using the PO Consolidation feature."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Special Orders Video Series"}], "data-id": "special-orders-video-series"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To find the training video series on Special Orders, see "}, {"text": "Video - Special Orders"}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Process a Special Order Purchase Order"}], "data-id": "process-a-special-order-purchase-order"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To review and process the Purchase Order:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open "}, {"text": "Back Office", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Inventory > PO Management > PO Manager", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Use the "}, {"text": "Special Orders ", "bold": true}, {"text": "filter to view Purchase Orders with Special Order items only"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppi30EAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppi30EAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip2 (86).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Ensure the "}, {"text": "PO Status ", "bold": true}, {"text": "filter is set to Incomplete"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The On-Order status is selected by default"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Update the rest of the Filters as required"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Search", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open", "bold": true}, {"text": " the Purchase Order"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To quickly view the customer order associated to the Special Order items click the Linked Special Orders button at the bottom"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppi35EAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppi35EAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip3 (58).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "You can do the same with Linked Transfers, but at this point the results will be blank, as the Transfers aren't created until the Purchase Order has been received"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Update", "bold": true}, {"text": " the Order as required"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add an ETA Date to the Purchase Order if known"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The ETA date is displayed on the customer Order in POS on the Fulfilment tab"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add Items", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Special Order products are indicated by a basket icon on the left of the product"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppi3AEAQ.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppi3AEAQ.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip3 (59).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To increase the quantity of the product for the special order item (if you wanted to grab a few extra to have in stock) click "}, {"text": "Pencil ", "bold": true}, {"text": "icon"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter the new quantity and click "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppi3FEAQ.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppi3FEAQ.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip0 - 2023-07-10T004730.732.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "Total Order Qty ", "bold": true}, {"text": "will be increased to show the full amount to be ordered, but the "}, {"text": "Special Ord Qty ", "bold": true}, {"text": "value will remain the same"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppi3BEAQ.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppi3BEAQ.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip1 - 2023-07-10T004735.020.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To see other items on order from this same supplier on Incomplete Orders still to be be processed click "}, {"text": "Consolidate Items", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "A list of the products will be displayed, use the tick boxes in the right-hand side to select the products"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Move to current PO", "bold": true}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The Supplier Buy (Ex) price for the products that are moved will be the current Supplier Buy (Ex) price. If a custom price was set on the previous PO, the new PO will need to updated before being placed on order."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add Items", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab; the new items will be displayed"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Update the rest of the Purchase Order as required"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Place On-Order", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "At this point the Order in POS will be updated to show the Purchase Order details, including the status of "On-Order"."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphyaEAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphyaEAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip2 (87).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The number displayed will be the number of Special Order items linked to this customer Order, not the total number on the PO."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Frequently Asked Questions"}], "data-id": "frequently-asked-questions"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Deleting/removing Special Order items", "bold": true}], "data-id": "deleting-removing-special-order-items"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A Purchase Order is created immediately after the POS sale is finalised. This PO is linked to the customer sale in POS."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "if you need to delete a Special Order item, you'll also need to remove the product from the Purchase Order (assuming you no longer wish to order the product)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To delete a Special Order item:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "POS - ", "bold": true}, {"text": "Delete the product from the sale in POS (for detailed information on this process refer to "}, {"text": "POS - Managing Products on a Sale"}, {"text": ")"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Purchase Order - ", "bold": true}, {"text": "Delete the product from the Purchase Order (you will be unable to do this step until the product has been removed from the linked order in POS)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h4", "children": [{"text": "Adding additional Special Order items to the sale", "bold": true}], "data-id": "adding-additional-special-order-items-to-the-sale"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you add additional products to the sale in POS after the sale was originally finalised, these products will be created on a separate Purchase Order."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can consolidate the items onto a single order if required, to ensure you only need to send a single Purchase Order to your supplier. See the "}, {"text": "Special Orders - Process a Purchase Order"}, {"text": " article for more information."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Want more information? Find related articles here:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Special Orders - Special Orders Overview"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Special Orders - Selling Special Order Items"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Special Orders - Receive a Purchase Order"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Special Orders - Processing Transfers"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Special Orders - Fulfilling Sales"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Special Orders - Special Orders Report"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "POS Settings - Order Conditions"}]}]}]}]
